dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3520 IS: Community Law Enforcement Authority Restoration Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Lummis (for herself, Mr. Barrasso, Mr. Curtis, and Mr. Lee) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry

form.official-title: To prohibit the Secretary of Agriculture from implementing a Forest Service rule relating to criminal prohibitions, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Community Law Enforcement Authority Restoration Act of 2025 or the CLEAR Act of 2025.

section.header: Invaliding Forest Service rule relating to criminal prohibitions

subsection.text: The rule of the Forest Service entitled Law Enforcement; Criminal Prohibitions (89 Fed. Reg. 92808 (November 25, 2024)) shall have no force or effect.
The Secretary of Agriculture shall not administer, implement, or enforce the rule described in subsection (a) or any substantially similar rule.
